title: Mycorrhizae Nutrient Trade
script_summary: Exploring the fascinating and complex nutrient exchange between mycorrhizae and plants.

segments.voiceover: Did you know plants have their own secret trade network?
It's called mycorrhizae, a partnership between fungi and plant roots.
These fungi extend roots, increasing water and nutrient absorption.
In return, plants share sugars produced during photosynthesis.
But what happens when this trade goes wrong?
Unhealthy soils or pollution can disrupt this balance, affecting plant health.
Curious to learn more about nature's secrets? Hit subscribe!
